scripts.cy:run: npm run clean:reports && cypress run && npm run report
scripts.report: npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
scripts.cy:login: npm run clean:reports && cypress run --spec 'cypress/e2e/login/*' && npm run report
scripts.cy:inventory: npm run clean:reports && cypress run --spec 'cypress/e2e/inventory/*' && npm run report
